name: SIP Coffee Bar
summary: Central Bordeaux specialty coffee bar candidate close to civic landmarks and likely finish-day walking routes.
whyItMatters: A practical high-quality coffee option for the Stage 7 Bordeaux morning if the group is moving around the city center.
pros: European Coffee Trip lists SIP Coffee Bar in Bordeaux's specialty guide
OpenStreetMap places it on Rue des Trois Conils in central Bordeaux
Likely more convenient to central sightseeing/finish-area wandering than outlying cafes
cons: Current official opening hours were not found in crawlable sources
Central race-day access may be constrained

logistics.opening_hours: Unknown; verify before relying on it for Stage 7
logistics.distance_from_base: Central Bordeaux; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Potentially close to central finish-area activity, depending on final viewing point
logistics.transit: Central Bordeaux; verify tram/bus operations on race day
logistics.parking: Not recommended on Stage 7 finish day
logistics.road_closure_notes: Bordeaux finish-area closures need separate verification

timing.best_visit_window: Morning or early lunch coffee before finish crowds peak
timing.race_day_risk: Medium because central Bordeaux will be crowded on finish day

sources.title: European Coffee Trip Bordeaux guide
sources.note: Lists SIP Coffee Bar among Bordeaux specialty coffee candidates.

open_questions: Confirm current hours and whether service is quick enough for a race-day schedule.
Check whether Rue des Trois Conils has access restrictions around Stage 7.
